name: Top 20 Facebook Post Schedulers in 2025
description:
Are you still scrambling to put out your Facebook posts manually? Hashtag by hashtag? You can save a ton of time by 

This post will help you pick the right Facebook posts scheduler for your team. We’ll take a tour of the best platforms in the market. We’ll highlight the features and benefits that are most relevant to Facebook.

What is a Facebook post scheduler?

A Facebook post scheduler is a tool designed specifically for planning and automating content publication on Facebook. These tools are tailored to Facebook's unique features, including longer text posts, link sharing, and varied content types like events and polls. You can create posts in advance and set specific dates and times for them to go live, without needing to manually post each update.

Benefits of a Facebook post scheduler

Facebook post schedulers offer several advantages that can improve your social media strategy and save you time. Here are the key benefits:

  • Time efficiency: Create multiple posts at once and schedule them for future dates.
  • Consistent posting: Maintain a regular posting schedule to keep your audience engaged.
  • Optimal timing: Schedule posts for times when your audience is most active and likely to interact.
  • Content planning: Plan your content strategy in advance and visualize your posting calendar.
  • Cross-platform integration: Many schedulers allow posting to multiple social media platforms simultaneously.
  • Performance analytics: Track post engagement and reach to refine your content strategy.
  • Team collaboration: Enable multiple team members to contribute to content creation and scheduling.
  • Content library: Store and organize your posts, images, and videos in one central location.
  • Bulk uploading: Save time by uploading and scheduling multiple posts at once.

How to choose the best Facebook post scheduler?

Before listing out our Facebook schedulers, let's consider the criteria that’ll help you make a smart choice. 

Content planning features

A content calendar is essential to schedule fb posts. It lets you organize posts on a linear timeline, and this helps you prevent posting gaps and overlapping posts. The visual outlook gives you a quick overview of your schedule. At a glance, you can track upcoming posts. 

Collaboration Tools

External and internal collaboration are a huge part of planning and implementing social media strategy. For example, agencies need to share post schedules with clients, and different experts on a team may work on the same files simultaneously. 

A multi-purpose scheduler allows internal and external teams to collaborate on pre-scheduling posts. 

Approvals and publishing workflows  

A customizable and multi-layered workflow minimizes missteps and miscommunications in the post scheduling process. It sets standards and requirements for each step of the way, with quality check criteria. To speed up publishing, you can use an auto-posting tool to publish posts automatically after the final approval. 

Customer support

It’s crucial to choose a software that’s up-to-date. The app should be regularly updated, and customer support should be available to assist when there are issues with the update.  

Facebook-specific Features

Choose a scheduler that satisfies personal factors such as:

  • Targeted platforms - ensure it covers Facebook (and other platforms you might consider in the future)  
  • Tagging capabilities - for your target industry
  • Reels - make sure you can post instantly to Facebook reels
  • Analytics - track what’s working and what not

Integration facilities.

Evaluate your needs for future growth. For example, a big company or marketing agency with a wide digital footprint might need software that integrates with all the major social media platforms.

Managed Services

This comes in handy when you don’t have the bandwidth to consistently manage your Facebook profile. Look for a tool that offers managed social media services as well.

Whitelabeling

If you’re an agency, a tool that allows you to white label its platform will help you drive more business under your own brand name.

seo.description: Looking for a Facebook scheduler to ramp up your social strategy? Here’s a list of the top free and paid Facebook post schedulers to try in 2025!
